prestazioni: AM28 4.7L V8 (AM08 engine code) forced induction upgrade via Rotrex C38-92 supercharger with custom billet intake manifold, increasing boost to 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) for ~600 HP at 7,500 RPM on 99 RON fuel, paired with a bespoke Bosch Motorsport MED17.7.3 ECU remap by Dyno Dynamics UK with anti-lag and launch control strategies

Full titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust system by Akrapović with 70mm carbon-fiber tips, featuring a straight-through design with electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization, reducing weight by 12 kg over OEM

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the GT8’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and adjustable ride height via billet aluminum top mounts, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs for improved turn-in response
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Prior Design (PD-GT8 kit), extending front fenders by 50mm and rear quarters by 70mm to accommodate 20x10.5 ET30 (front) and 20x12 ET35 (rear) BBS FI-R wheels with 265/30 and 305/25 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Vorsteiner, constructed from pre-preg carbon fiber with integrated air curtains and a 3-stage gurney flap for -120 kg of downforce at 150 mph, replacing the OEM GT8 aero package

Full interior retrim by Saddleback Leather, featuring hand-stitched Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara headliner, carbon-fiber door cards with billet aluminum door pulls, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline Zero 360
